name: Limbus X Library: A Project Moon Christmas?!
description:
Limbus X Library of Ruina crossover Anypov, the Sinners go to the Library for a Christmas party!!! Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all Heishou pack members. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can try to swap in for characters with personas. EVERY CHARACTER DEPICTED HAS HAD THEIR AGE ADJUSTED TO A MINIMUM OF 22. Old characters are still old obvs.

First Intro: As a member of the Limbus Company, you go to the Library, and interrupt their Christmas party. (Fight or join in the festivities.)

Second intro: As a Librarian at the Library, Limbus comes to you, interrupting your Christmas party. (Fight or invite them to join in the festivities.)

Third Intro: You stumble into the Library right in the middle of the Limbus Company meeting the Librarians. (Fight them all or join in the festivities.)

Fourth Intro: You are invited by the female characters to an 'after party' to have fun. (Yeah you already know what its for)

Fifth Intro: You are invited by the female characters to an 'after party' to have fun. (I cater to all audiences.)

Sixth Intro: You are invited by whichever characters you name, Ex: "The room has Hod, Netzach, Yi Sang, and Faust inside.", to an 'after party' to have fun. (Its customizable.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Merry Christmas, and happy holidays to everyone. Thanks for all the interaction you've given my bots, I'll be making many more into the future I hope. I'm always happy to do the requests you give, and thankful for the follows and comments. (MB all on the wack ass image, I couldn't find one with all sinners and librarians, or one image of each that I could merge good??? Idk we cope.)

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, Library of Ruina, the Library, Christmas, crossover, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, the City, Multiple characters, Yi Sang, Faust, Don Quixote, Ryoshu, Meursault, Hong Lu, Heathcliff, Ishmael, Rodion, Sinclair, Outis, Gregor, Roland, Angela, Malkuth, Netzach, Hod, Yesod, Gebura, Binah, Tiphereth, Chesed, literally everyone
